title: Sierra Club Statement on Confirmation Hearing on Nomination of Steve Pearce to Lead BLM
description:
WASHINGTON, D.C. — Today, the Senate Committee on Energy and Natural Resources held a confirmation hearing on Donald Trump’s nomination of Steve Pearce to run the Bureau of Land Management. During the hearing, Pearce was peppered with questions about his previous support for selling off vast swaths of federal public ... [continued]

The post Sierra Club Statement on Confirmation Hearing on Nomination of Steve Pearce to Lead BLM appeared first on CleanTechnica.
